@jaspergregory @nzmrmn @oaklandcami Cheers, I have no personal problems with anyone- disagreement or not- if you fight for occupy. =]
@nzmrmn @oaklandcami @jaspergregory My intention was merely to hope that if a new media collective was formed, it be under an unsullied name
@jaspergregory @oaklandcami @nzmrmn Would definitely be interested- keep the updates coming... consider, perhaps, a weekend meeting?
@oaklandcami @jaspergregory @nzmrmn Because of all the names involved...
@oaklandcami @jaspergregory @nzmrmn That's why I said that- I would be very much interested in a non-OOMedia collective, nothing personal
@oaklandcami @jaspergregory @oomedia @geekeasy I mean to say that my 9-to-whatever startup job keeps me from making most meetings.
@oaklandcami @jaspergregory @oomedia @geekeasy I appreciate that suggestion- if there was a meeting I could attend I probably would've.
@nzmrmn @jaspergregory @oomedia @geekeasy Exclusionist attitude gains you what? Saying I like the idea- can't help w/ current circumstances
@jaspergregory @oomedia @geekeasy @oaklandcami I'd be joyful to contribute to a local media collective, but never one bearing OOMedia name

"It's in a blue box, I swear." "I said, it's square!" haha Sharleigh relaying Taylyn.
Taylyn is like, complaining about how she hurt herself in an accident. I'm all "How?" and she goes "Well, we were quadding with no glasses."
Debating buying some monkey picked tea. Monkey picked tea.
It is beautiful outside.
Beautiful effing almost-spring day, three rad chicks are hanging out at the farm waiting for me, and I can't get a fucking ride. Useless.
Showered. Might go to the farm & hang out with Brigid, Daisy, and Gabby. I miss the farm a lot.
I'm listening to Kitsune Noir's Deep Blue Sea mixtape, and Colin is playing guitar hero. Buying my little brother a Death Cab shirt.
Colin, an avid 4channer, no idea about Gaia. Really?
Waking up. Hangin' with Colin. Listening to Radiohead.
Back at my parents house where I mostly ride my minibike around the neighborhood and then pop on the ps4 for a little call of duty, wait, what do you mean regression?
@JoshKrisch what, am I dead now?
Laying in bed. Going to sleep. Long day, felt like.
Listening to SmodCast.
playing a little Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare. http://raptr.com/pseudoplacebo
Post-rain outdoor crispness so I climbed a tree. Felt fucking amazing. I jumped down and landed perfectly on my feet. All I could ever want.
The art of having a reporter read the quote, rather than just playing a recording, is slowly dying. Remember that shit- it's good.
Stray satellite vaporized in intergalactic traffic stop incident.
Deep thoughts about airplanes and satellites.
I wanna make movies. I wanna be part of making an indie film.
Humboldt County is a really great movie. Like, many dreams packed together into a beautiful movie. Scope it out.
